build.buildCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && DJANGO_COLLECTSTATIC=1 python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

deploy.startCommand: sh -c "python manage.py migrate --noinput && (python manage.py create_initial_user || true) && (python manage.py seed_content || true) && exec gunicorn jaytipargal.asgi:application -k uvicorn.workers.UvicornWorker --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --workers 2 --timeout 120"
